name: Ubiquiti Protect All-In-One Sensor
title: Ubiquiti Protect All-In-One Sensor
short_description: Smart Multi-Sensor, Bluetooth 5.0, Lithium Battery CR123A
description: The Ubiquiti Protect All-In-One Sensor (UP-Sense) is a versatile and powerful device designed to enhance security and environmental monitoring in both home and business settings. This compact sensor is battery-powered and capable of detecting a wide range of activities and changes in its environment. The sensor seamlessly integrates into the UniFi ecosystem through Bluetooth connectivity with UniFi Bluetooth-enabled access points, enabling easy setup and management.

detailed_description.heading: Motion Detection
detailed_description.text: It has the capability to sense motion up to a distance of 5 meters (16 feet), making it an essential component for monitoring unauthorized movements or activity in specified areas.

detailed_description.heading: Environmental Sensing
detailed_description.text: The UP-Sense can measure temperature and humidity, providing valuable data on the indoor climate, which can be crucial for both comfort and equipment operation conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Ambient Light Sensing
detailed_description.text: This feature allows the sensor to detect changes in light levels, offering potential use in scenarios where lighting conditions need to be monitored or controlled.

detailed_description.heading: Alarm Sound Sensing
detailed_description.text: The sensor is equipped to recognize the sound patterns of alarms following the UL217 and UL2034 standards, making it an integral part of a comprehensive safety system by alerting users to potential dangers.

detailed_description.heading: Door and Window Sensing
detailed_description.text: With its magnetic entry sensor, the UP-Sense can monitor the status of doors and windows, alerting users to any openings or closings, thereby enhancing perimeter security.

detailed_description.heading: Long Battery Life
detailed_description.text: Designed for longevity, it operates efficiently up to one year on a single battery, reducing the need for frequent replacements and maintenance.

detailed_description.heading: Durable Design
detailed_description.text: The UP-Sense is designed with a focus on discreetness and durability. It comes with a polycarbonate enclosure and mounts, ensuring it can be securely and unobtrusively installed in various settings. Its compact dimensions (Ø24 x 83.5 mm, Ø0.9 x 3.3 inches) and light weight (50.2 grams) make it easy to place without drawing attention. The device is also equipped with LEDs for status indication and a factory reset button. It operates within a temperature range of 0 to 45°C and a humidity range of 10 to 90% non-condensing, ensuring robust performance across various environments.
